mapper.select: select id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from announcement where status = 1 and is_deleted = 0 order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into announcement(title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select:
select id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from announcement
and (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by updated_at desc
mapper.update:
update announcement
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
status = #{status},
created_at = #{createdAt},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
where id = #{id}
